task_completion.description: Open and read the shipment manifest file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/shipment_manifest.txt' showing the list of five chemicals.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the official CAMEO Chemicals website.
Search for the chemicals on the CAMEO website to find their Reactive Groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser tabs or history showing the agent viewing the specific chemical datasheets on the CAMEO website and locating the 'Reactive Group' section for the chemicals.

task_completion.description: Create a new CSV file with the required column headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application or text editor showing a new file with the exact headers: 'Chemical Name', 'Reactive Group', and 'Storage Code'.

task_completion.description: Enter the chemicals and their exact CAMEO Reactive Groups into the CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file populated with the five chemicals and their corresponding reactive groups (e.g., 'Acids, Strong Non-oxidizing' for Hydrochloric Acid, 'Oxidizing Agents, Strong' for Sodium Permanganate).

task_completion.description: Assign the correct Storage Codes based on precedence rules and save the file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file showing the correct storage codes (A, O, B, F, B) assigned to the respective chemicals, and evidence of the file being saved as 'storage_plan.csv' in the '~/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actively used a web browser to search the CAMEO database rather than hallucinating the data from its own weights.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing active navigation, search queries, and page loads on the CAMEO Chemicals website.

integrity.description: The agent used GUI applications (browser, text editor/spreadsheet) to complete the task rather than relying solely on terminal commands or automated scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of graphical applications like a web browser and a text editor/spreadsheet tool being actively used in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output file to the exact requested directory rather than an arbitrary location.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer confirming the file is placed in '~/Documents/' and named 'storage_plan.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The five chemicals and their expected Reactive Groups and Storage Codes are: 1. Hydrochloric Acid -> 'Acids, Strong Non-oxidizing' -> Code A. 2. Sodium Permanganate -> 'Oxidizing Agents, Strong' -> Code O. 3. Triethylamine -> 'Amines, Phosphines, and Pyridines' -> Code B. 4. Methyl Ethyl Ketone -> 'Ketones' -> Code F. 5. Potassium Hydroxide -> 'Bases, Strong' -> Code B. The final CSV must have columns 'Chemical Name', 'Reactive Group', and 'Storage Code'.
